columns.name: Timestamp
columns.description:
The date and time that the line was written to the database.

This is used when there are multiple lines for each identity, such as when a change is detected, or if 24 hours have passed since the last database line was added.

columns.name: ReportId
columns.description: Unique identifier for the event

columns.name: SourceProviderAccountId
columns.description: Identifier for the account in the source provider (for example, object ID for a Microsoft Entra ID account)

columns.name: AccountId
columns.description: Internal identifier for the account

columns.name: IdentityId
columns.description: Identifier for the identity that the account is linked to

columns.name: IsPrimary
columns.description: Indicates if this account is considered as primary account for the linked identity

columns.name: IdentityLinkType
columns.description: Type of linkage between the account and identity; possible values: Manual, Strong identifiers

columns.name: IdentityLinkReason
columns.description: Reason for linking the account and identity. If the linkage type is manual, the value will be the justification comment added by the user.

columns.name: IdentityLinkTime
columns.description: Date and time the account was linked to the identity

columns.name: IdentityLinkBy
columns.description: The entity that linked the account to the identity. If the linkage type is based on strong identifiers, the value will be System

columns.name: DisplayName
columns.description: Name of the account user displayed in the address book. Typically a combination of a given or first name, a middle initial, and a last name or surname.

columns.name: AccountUpn
columns.description: User principal name (UPN) of the account

columns.name: EmailAddress
columns.description: SMTP address of the account

columns.name: CriticalityLevel
columns.description: The criticality score of the account

columns.name: DefenderRiskLevel
columns.description: The risk level of the account as calculated by Microsoft Defender

columns.name: DefenderRiskUpdateTime
columns.description: Date and time Microsoft Defender last updated the risk level of the account

columns.name: Type
columns.description: Type of identity; possible values: User, ServiceAccount

columns.name: GivenName
columns.description: Given name or first name of the account user

columns.name: Surname
columns.description: Surname, family name, or last name of the account user

columns.name: EmployeeId
columns.description: Employee identifier assigned to the user by the organization

columns.name: Department
columns.description: Name of the department that the account user belongs to

columns.name: JobTitle
columns.description: Job title of the account user

columns.name: Address
columns.description: Address of the account user

columns.name: City
columns.description: City where the account user is located

columns.name: Country
columns.description: Country/Region where the account user is located

columns.name: Phone
columns.description: The listed phone number of the account user

columns.name: Manager
columns.description: The listed manager of the account user

columns.name: Sid
columns.description: Security identifier (SID) of the account

columns.name: AccountStatus
columns.description: The status of the account; possible values: Disabled, Enabled, Deleted

columns.name: SourceProvider
columns.description: Source application or service of the account (for example, Microsoft Entra ID)

columns.name: SourceProviderInstanceId
columns.description: The identifier of the source application or service of the account. For example, in Microsoft Entra ID, this is the organization Globally Unique Identifier (GUID).

columns.name: SourceProviderInstanceDisplayName
columns.description: The display name of the source application or service of the account

columns.name: AuthenticationMethod
columns.description: Authentication method used to allow the account user to sign into the account; possible values: Credentials, Federated, Hybrid

columns.name: AuthenticationSourceAcccountId
columns.description: The identifier of the federating account, if the authentication method is Federated

columns.name: EnrolledMfas
columns.description: Types of multifactor authentication methods configured for the account user and their status

columns.name: LastPasswordChangeTime
columns.description: Date and time the account password was last changed

columns.name: GroupMembership
columns.description: Group identifiers assigned to the account

columns.name: AssignedRoles
columns.description: Role identifiers assigned to the account

columns.name: EligibleRoles
columns.description: Identifiers for roles the account are eligible to use (for example, Microsoft Entra Privileged Identity Management roles)

columns.name: TenantMembershipType
columns.description: User type; possible values: Guest, Member

columns.name: CreatedDateTime
columns.description: Date and time when the user account was created

columns.name: DeletedDateTime
columns.description: Date and time when the user account was deleted

columns.name: Tags
columns.description: Tags assigned to the account by Defender for Identity

columns.name: SourceProvderRiskLevel
columns.description: Risk level of the account as it appears in the source provider; possible values: Low, Medium, High

columns.name: AdditionalFields
columns.description: Additional information about the entity or event

columns.name: TenantId
columns.description: Universally unique identifier (UUID) for the tenant
